title: Filter Players by Score
description: You are given a table called 'players' containing game results. Write a SELECT query that returns the name of every player whose score is greater than 100, ordered alphabetically by name.
outputFormat: One player name per line, ordered alphabetically.
constraints: Your query must include ORDER BY name. Only SELECT queries are allowed.
sampleSolution: SELECT name FROM players WHERE score > 100 ORDER BY name;
hint: Use WHERE to filter rows and ORDER BY to ensure consistent ordering.

testCases.setupSql: CREATE TABLE players (id INTEGER, name TEXT, score INTEGER); INSERT INTO players VALUES (1, 'Alice', 80), (2, 'Bob', 150), (3, 'Charlie', 200);
